Educational Image Finder

Find open diagrams and images for tests, slides and worksheets.

Search Openverse, Wikimedia Commons and NASA, then save the image URL, source page, licence and attribution in one place.

Default safety filter Public domain, CC0, CC BY, CC BY-SA, CC BY-NC and NASA educational/informational-use results.
Use note: this app records licence information, but you should still open the source page before publishing or selling a resource.

Image tray

0 saved

Saved images and placeholders will appear here.

Results

Start a search

Ranked by source fit, licence openness, likely diagram relevance and available image size.

Start with a topic or paste a question.

For science tests, terms like “labelled diagram”, “schematic”, “structure”, “cycle” and “process” usually help.
